violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Observed 2 employees eating in the kitchen.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Observed scoop handles stored in the diced fruits.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Single use container being used as a scoop in the brussel sprouts.
